insight.summary: GitHub Actions action versions in LLM training data are significantly behind current major releases
insight.detail: As of 2026-03, commonly used GitHub Actions are multiple major versions ahead of what LLM training data contains. For example, actions/checkout is at v6 and astral-sh/setup-uv is at v7, while training data may reference v4 and v5 respectively. Using outdated major versions can miss important features, performance improvements, and security fixes.
insight.action: Always verify current major versions of GitHub Actions before writing workflows. Use `gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/releases/latest --jq '.tag_name'` to check the latest release for each action.
